user_scenarios.user_goal: As an ai_infra wiki maintainer, verify that crawled accelerator raw evidence is converted into structured SKU, observation, and resolved specification data that can be inspected from the crawler workbench.
prerequisites: The crawler workbench backend and frontend dependencies are available.
Compute accelerator raw crawler evidence exists under personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/raw/crawler/.
The structured accelerator catalog exists under personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/data/compute_accelerators/.
user_scenarios.entrypoint: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=$(pwd) && cd personal-wiki/apps/crawler_workbench/backend && PYTHONPATH=. pytest -q tests/test_accelerator_specs.py tests/test_db_profiles.py tests/test_discovery.py && cd ../frontend && npm test && npm run build && cd "$REPO_ROOT" && python personal-wiki/tools/wiki_cli/cli.py --root personal-wiki validate-accelerators && python personal-wiki/tools/wiki_cli/cli.py --root personal-wiki validate --domain ai_infra'
steps: Run backend tests for accelerator spec extraction and existing profile/discovery behavior.
Run frontend tests that cover structured accelerator specs visibility.
Validate the accelerator catalog and ai_infra wiki domain.
expected_outcomes: Raw captures from specs_candidate accelerator sources produce source-backed structured observations.
Known extracted fields preserve source_id, raw_path or source locator, source rank, confidence, units, and captured timestamp.
Resolved specs are created only when source policy allows it; S5 sources are not auto-resolved.
The crawler workbench exposes structured accelerator specs without hiding the existing source subscriptions or candidate queue.
Wiki accelerator validation and ai_infra validation pass.
failure_signals: The extractor writes unproven values without source references.
The extractor overwrites conflicting observations instead of preserving provenance.
S5 or low-trust data is auto-resolved without review metadata.
The frontend cannot display extracted accelerator specs or regresses the existing Sources page.
cleanup: Remove .codex/evaluations/tasks/compute-accelerator-spec-extraction-01/ if a clean rerun is needed.
